title: games
description: the number of games a player has played in.  the player must have batted or played in the field for this stat to count.

title: plate appearances
description: the number of times a player was sent up to bat.

title: at-bats
description: the number of times a batter completed an at-bat.  this matters because walk-off plate appearances happen quite often, and do not count to rate stats.

title: on-stakes
description: the number of times a batter reached first stake safely.  is the sum of (h), (s1), and (a1).

title: (hidden stat) passed ball advance
description: the number of times a batter reached first safely because of defensive negligence or error.  is the sum of (os), (-s1), and (-h)

title: hits
description: the number of times a player reached first safely on his own hit.  sum of (1s), (2s), (3s), (4s), and (hr)

title: singles
description: the number of times a player's hit resulted in a single*

title: doubles
description: the number of times a player's hit resulted in a double*

title: triples
description: the number of times a player's hit resulted in a triple*

title: quadruples
description: the number of times a player's hit resulted in a quadruple*

title: home runs
description: the number of times a player's hit resulted in a home run*

title: (hidden stat) weighted stakes
description: the weighted number of stakes advanced result from a batter hit.  (21*(1s)/55) + (2s) + 2*(3s) + 3*(42) + 4*(5s)

title: runs batted in
description: the number of times a runner (including the hitter) scored on the batter's hit

title: stolen stakes
description: number of times a runner took a base that was not free, up to the discretion of the scorer.  sume of (s1), (s2), (s3), (s4), and (s5)

title: steals of first
description: number of times a runner stole first

title: steals of second
description: number of times a runner stole second

title: steals of third
description: number of times a runner stole third

title: steals of fourth
description: number of times a runner stole fourth

title: steals of fifth
description: number of times a runner stole fifth

title: runs
description: number of times a runner scored a run

title: outs
description: number of times a batter or runner was put out.  sum of (z), (k), (f), (t), and (p)

title: zones
description: number of times a batter zoned out (including if they hit the zone with their bat)

title: strikeouts
description: number of times a batter struck out

title: (secondary? stat)** flyouts
description: number of times a batter flies out (batted ball caught on the fly)

title: (secondary? stat)** tags
description: number of times a runner is tagged out

title: (secondary? stat)** pegs
description: number of times a runner is pegged out

title: on-stake percentage
description: rate stat: (os)/(ab)

title: batting average
description: rate stat: (h)/(at)

title: slugging percentage
description: rate stat: (ws)/(at)

title: pegouts
description: number of times a fielder made a peg out

title: flyouts
description: number of times a fielder made an out.  sum of (fo), (po), and (to)

title: flyouts
description: number of times a fielder caught a batted ball on the fly

title: tagouts
description: number of times a fielder made a tag out

title: pickoffs
description: number of times a pitcher, catcher, or backup catcher successfully picked off a runner at a base

title: defensive assists
description: number of times a fielder fielded a ball which led to an out.  baseball counts any time a fielder touches the ball in an out play,

title: games pitched
description: number of ganes in which a player pitched

title: complete games
description: number of games in which a pitcher pitched the entire game

title: shutouts
description: number of times a pitcher gave up 0 runs in a complete game

title: wins
description: number of games a pitcher wins

title: losses
description: number of games a pitcher loses

title: saves
description: number of games a pitcher saved

title: zones
description: number of times a pitcher zones a batter

title: strikeouts
description: number of times a pitcher strikes a batter out

title: runs
description: number of runs a pitcher gives up

title: outs
description: number of times a pitcher finished an inning

title: win percentage
description: rate stat: (W)/((W)+(L))

title: runs per out
description: rate stat: (R)/(O)

title: out efficiency
description: rate stat: (OS)/(O)
